description: Its amazing how many goproblems I do in school. Now I am on my economics lesson where we learn how to found a company and we make some financial planning for it and its so booring! The teacher is showing us some principes we have learnt at least in two different subjects in the past two years.. why dont we just sing songs or tell fairy tales or anything instead of that we are doing now? Fortunately we are in a computer room now so I can at least play go and pretend that I am playing attention...
